text: 13 April 2026 - 03 July 2026 | Montpellier University Space Centre (CSUM)
Software development for the ground segment of satellite projects within the space centre.

Design, development and Docker-based deployment of the centre's new SRDB (Satellite Reference DataBase) in Full-Stack Django. This mission-critical component centralises the configuration, operational modes, mode transitions, telecommands and telemetry required to control and operate the satellite, applying rigorous software architectures under a Linux environment with version control using Git and GitLab.
